summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 15 warning, 12 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:86 — `runGateInline` duplicates ~55 lines of parsing/verdict/artifact logic from `cmdGate` in gate.mjs. Extract a shared helper to eliminate drift between the two gate paths.
🟡 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:215 — `VALID_SEVERITIES` Set allocated per call; move to module scope as constant.
🟡 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:264 — `isGenericJson` + `parseGenericJson` double-parse the same JSON string; combine detect+parse for the JSON path.

🟡 `bin/lib/gate.mjs:159` — `cmdGate` handshake uses `newWarnings.length` (backlog) for warning count instead of parsed validator warnings; `runGateInline` correctly counts parsed warnings — inconsistency between the two paths
🟡 `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:288` — `detectAndParse` double-parses JSON (once in `isGenericJson`, again in `parseGenericJson`); wasteful on large payloads
🟡 SPEC.md:24 — `.team/validators.json` config override (SPEC acceptance criterion #8) is not implemented in any code path; must be tracked as remaining work before feature ships
🟡 `test/worktree.test.mjs:170` — `runGateInline` has parser integration code but zero tests exercising it with structured output; only exit-code tests exist
🟡 `test/parsers.test.mjs:667` — No gate integration test passes `--task`, so artifact writing (`validator-findings.json`, handshake) is entirely untested
🟡 `test/parsers.test.mjs:847` — No test for warning-only findings (zero criticals) confirming PASS verdict
🟡 `test/parsers.test.mjs:847` — No gate integration test for malformed input fallback (SPEC requirement)
**No 🔴 critical findings** — none of the four veto categories (dead code, premature abstraction, unnecessary indirection, gold-plating) are triggered.
- 🟡 `bin/lib/gate.mjs:110` — ~30 lines of parsing+verdict+artifact logic duplicated with `run.mjs:86`; extract a shared helper
- 🟡 `parsers.mjs:241` — `isJUnitXml`, `isTAP`, `isProblemMatcher`, `isGenericJson` are exported but have zero external consumers; remove `export`
- 🟡 `parsers.mjs:264` — `isGenericJson` parses JSON fully, then `parseGenericJson` parses it again (double parse)
- 🟡 `gate.mjs:27` — Path-traversal sanitization regex duplicated identically at `run.mjs:56`; extract a `sanitizeTaskId()` function
